original text:
positions at our office in Lagos.
All application accompanied with a detailed CV in MS Word format (not more than 2 pages) along with a passport size photo must be sent to our email (career@grimaldi-nigeria.com ) within one week of this publication.
The subject line of the email must include the reference number for the position applied. No manual application at company office would be accepted.
A manager level position that is responsible not only to maintain existing customers but also secure new business for company's container and general cargo business. He/she must have great passion for sales and be ready to deliver fantastic results.
Minimum of 5 years cognate experience in maritime industry including 3 years in similar position.
A manager level position that is responsible for coordinating the day to day activities of the marketing unit. He/she must be energetic, have flair for data and possess an analytic mind.
Minimum of 7 years cognate experience in maritime industry including 3 years in similar position.
This is a team leader position. The individual will be required to supervise and coordinate the activities of the customer care team dealing with customer enquiries, advisories and information.
We are looking out for a dynamic and energetic person to lead the internal audit department. He/She, an experienced accountant, will be responsible to audit all functions of the agency. The manager is expected to implement tools to identify areas of deficiency in an efficient manner and suggest corrective actions to management. The manager leads a team of 4 staff currently with future increase in the department portfolio.
Coordinate, supervise and control the general tasks related to audit of documents, charges and fraud prevention.
Study operational procedures of all departments and suggest improvement on regular basis.
Report compliance to all statutory provisions of the federal/state and local laws.
A good first degree in Social sciences (2nd class upper preferable) from a reputable University/Polytechnic.
Qualified chartered accountant (lCAN, ACCA, CMA).
Minimum 5 years cognate experience in maritime industry including 3 years in similar position.

original text:
SendOvernightMail.com is the fastest and easiest way to print and ship letters, documents, forms, and other time sensitive items online via Fedex or USPS Priority Mail. SendOvernightMail delivers quickly to Perris, California and allows you to meet all your shipping needs online. All Fedex orders are fulfilled via a Fedex Kinkos location. Get instant delivery times, pricing and tracking numbers at the one stop shop for all your expedited document and mailing needs.
If you're wondering how much it costs to send overnight mail, whether single letter, or bulk mail, to Perris, California, see the table with costs and delivery estimates below. Click Get Started to get send your mail now!
Perris, California is the number 466 city in the US, with a population of over 72326. SendOvernightMail makes it a breeze to print and mail expedited letters, documents and forms to Perris. Try us out now, or email team@sendovernightmail.com with questions, comments or suggestions!

The warming climate will affect Mashomack's trees. Come learn about our forests of the future.
This event is for adults or mature children ages 12 and up.
Register at 631-749-4219 or MashomackPreserve@tnc.org. Programs are free unless noted. Donations appreciated.

original text: ZNAZeybekoglu Nayman Associates is an award winning design firm of Architecture, Urban Design, Master Planning, with offices in Cambridge, USA and Beijing, China. Responding to the need of excellence in design and project management, ZNA presents credentials that reflect an exceptional and rare array of experience. With 40 years experience, ZNA is a firm with national and international credits. ZNA projects span many areas of the world and include a diverse palate of project types, including campus master plans, urban design, residential developments, and educational, commercial and institutional facilities. ZNA Beijing represents a unionof highly experienced architects and planners with profound design skills and rich backgrounds. ZNA Beijing is currently seeking individual talent to assist on several exciting projects. If you are interested in joining us, please send your resume / relevant work samples to: info-beijing@znarch.com.
